# Garlic Bread

Source: https://example.com/garlic-bread
Tags: side, bread, garlic
Serves: 4

## Ingredients

- 1 baguette
- 50g butter
- 3 cloves of garlic, crushed
- 1 tbsp parsley, chopped

## Method

1. Mix the butter with the garlic and parsley.

2. Slice the baguette and spread the butter mixture on each slice.

3. Wrap in foil and bake at 200°C for 10 minutes.
